heading: How we bring these narratives to you.

items.title: Culturist Network
items.copy: Writers, anthropologists, designers, thinkers, and community-builders who document evolving cultures, identities, and truths. By bringing lived context to every story, they shape how narratives are told and co-create collective experiences.

paragraphs: A media publication for the ones the algorithm skips — culture-led stories from emerging worlds and unheard voices.
Long-form profiles, scene reports, and photo essays that treat the margins as the main stage. First dispatch: late 2026.
We document evolving cultures, identities, and truths — bringing lived context to every story.
Writers, anthropologists, designers, thinkers, and community-builders shape how narratives are told and co-created.

items.title: IRL & Live Experiences
items.copy: Experiences that feel less like events and more like temporary worlds. Built around subcultures, shared identities, and creative rituals, these IRL and live experiences are where (mis)fit communities come together to express, exchange, and belong.

paragraphs: Temporary worlds you can stand inside. Experiences that feel less like events and more like places.
Built around subcultures, shared identities, and creative rituals — where (mis)fit communities come together to express, exchange, and belong.
Ruhbaru — the sound of home, scaled into a cinematic live experience. India tour 2026.
Jupiter Pe Juice — a 90-minute musical satire where everyday absurdities become songs, punchlines, and cultural commentary.

items.title: Film Studio
items.copy: Led by Nirvair Rai, this production and narrative arm of the Cultural (Mis)fits ecosystem collaborates with brands, media, fashion, and CSR initiatives to create authentic, culture-native content rooted in real communities.

paragraphs: Films and brand work that carry cultural consequence. Led by Nirvair Rai.

His body of work spans documentary projects such as Landless Kings, which followed the lives of Rohingya refugees along the Myanmar–Bangladesh border, and Memory of Land, a reflection on 100 years of the Jallianwala Bagh massacre and the afterlives of colonial trauma, exhibited internationally.

Alongside this, Nirvair has built an extensive commercial and fashion portfolio, collaborating with brands and designers including Nike, Netflix, Sabyasachi, Tarun Tahiliani, Satya Paul, Vivo, Lenskart, Elle, and Vogue.
We help brands participate in culture without flattening it — documentary instincts, cinematic craft, and access to scenes no agency deck can fake.
